query:
SELECT c.externalId as customerExternalId, c.name as customerName, s.externalId as serviceExternalId, s.serviceType, s.phoneNumber, s.monthlyCost, s.provider
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Cory%'
LIMIT 10;
